Program_Description: Postpartum depression is a type of depression that happens after having a baby, affecting emotional well-being.
Target_Population: People who have recently given birth experiencing postpartum depression.

Program_Description: WIC provides nutritional support for low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women, infants, and children.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children.

Program_Description: Siskiyou County Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) is a federally funded program that provides healthy food benefits, nutrition education, breastfeeding support and family resources at no cost.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children.
Eligibility_Requirements: Are pregnant, breastfeeding, just had a baby (or recent pregnancy loss); or have a child or care for a child under age 5; and have low-to-medium income or receive Medi-Cal, CalWORKs (TANF), or CalFresh (SNAP) benefits.
Application_Process: Contact us to schedule an appointment at one of the SCPH WIC locations.
